schema.ion.id › core › localization › v1

core/localization/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/localization/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

LocalisedText

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/localization/v1#LocalisedText

PropertyMandatoryDescription
id—Bahasa Indonesia — always required
en—English — required for XB pattern
ms—Bahasa Melayu
zh—Mandarin Chinese (Simplified)
ar—Arabic
ta—Tamil
ko—Korean
ja—Japanese

IONCatalogLocalization

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/localization/v1#IONCatalogLocalization

PropertyMandatoryDescription
name—Product or service name as a language object. Supplements Beckn `Descriptor.name` (which carries the default-locale text
shortDesc—Short description for catalog listings and search results. Max 150 characters per language. Supplements Beckn `Descripto
longDesc—Full product description for product detail page. Supplements Beckn `Descriptor.longDesc`. "id" mandatory. "en" mandator

Pack README

ion-core/localization/v1

Multilingual text objects. Language-keyed with ISO 639-1 codes. 'id' always required.

Attaches to

`beckn:Resource.resourceAttributes, beckn:Provider.descriptor`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/localization/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
